steps.name: Sanitize station and tools
steps.detail_md: Wipe down boards, knives, and rails with sanitizer. Air-dry before use.

steps.name: Pull and date prep list items
steps.detail_md: Pull items from the walk-in per today's prep list. Label each with date and initials.

steps.name: Portion proteins to spec
steps.detail_md: Weigh proteins to the spec card. Flag any out-of-spec count to the MOD.

steps.name: Stock cold rail to par
steps.detail_md: Fill the cold rail to par levels. Keep product below 41°F.

steps.name: House dressing — par 3 qt
steps.detail_md: Make fresh batch if below 1 qt.

steps.name: Lemon wedges — par 1 hotel pan
steps.detail_md: Cut fresh; discard any over 24h old.

steps.name: Break down and clean machine
steps.detail_md: Drain, de-scale, and wipe the dish machine.

steps.name: Sanitize floor drains
steps.detail_md: Flush and sanitize all floor drains.

steps.name: Restock clean racks
steps.detail_md: Return clean racks to the line and prep stations.
